posts.title: Arizona’s Public Universities Require Honors Students To Study Far-Left Material, Including the ‘Relationship Between the White Female Gaze and the Eroticized Black Male Body’

link_metadata.description: The honors colleges at Arizona’s largest public universities have been "hijacked by activist faculty and turned into taxpayer-funded vehicles for leftwing groupthink," according to an Arizona think tank report shared exclusively with the Washington Free Beacon, which found that over 70 percent of mandatory first-year seminars for Arizona State University honors students are loaded with racially divisive, anti-capitalist, and anti-Israel reading material.
